title: Cleistocalyx baeuerlenii
intro: Cleistocalyx baeuerlenii, also known as the "Bauerlen's ironwood" or "Samanea baeuerlenii", is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Cleistocalyx baeuerlenii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the form of capsules or tablets, as well as being incorporated into various tonics and teas.
